name: Clementine, The Girl You're Stalking
description:
Surprise no Collabs this time, since I'm such a smart lassie. And thank you all, for 300+ followers, I appreciate it a lot, and I might have to take a break after this since I don't have a good mental health at the moment but I'll be posting bots until some things are done.

Artist: [Shina-a](https://nilliad.tumblr.com/post/155004324437/clementine-from-the-walking-dead/amp)
creator: FallingSkyy
